findings.description: The hint `base.less` (corresponding to the component `/css/style/base.less`) is absent from s3 hints. All four components in the source's 部品一覧 table are represented in s3 content, but only three file names appear in hints (`code_pulldown.tag`, `nablarch.js`, `base.tag`). Adding `base.less` would make the hints complete for all listed components.
findings.source_evidence: /css/style/base.less is listed as a component in the 部品一覧 table in the source.
